title: June 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 28''' is the 179th day of the year (180th in leap years), with 186 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1922|1922]] – [[Erik Bauersfeld]] is born.
*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Ken Wannberg|Kenneth Wannberg]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Richard Chew]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Michael W. Royer]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Rio Hackford]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Jesse J. Holland]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 21|''Star Wars Weekly'' 21]] published.
*1978 – An all-white costume concept for what would eventually evolve into the character of [[Boba Fett]] is officially unveiled to [[Lucasfilm]] insiders in a 20-minute black and white screen test.
*[[1981]] – [[Jon Watts]] is born.
*[[1984]] – ''[[The Baby Ewoks' Picnic Surprise]]'' published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope 1]]'' is published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 19|''Star Wars'' (1998) 19]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 4]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Hero's Guide]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 6|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 6]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Robert Timothy Smith]] is born.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.35]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Meshach Taylor]] dies.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Battlefront: Twilight Company]]'' paperback published.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 16|''Poe Dameron'' 16]] published.
*2017 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 8|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 8]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: Droids Unplugged 1|''Star Wars: Droids Unplugged'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Collapse of the Republic]]'' published.
*2019 – "[[Jedi vs. Sith - The Skywalker Saga]]" premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Shadow of the Sith]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Shadow of the Sith (audiobook)|''Shadow of the Sith'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Tales of the Jedi Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 3]]'' published in the United States.
*[[2023]] – [[Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian: The Making of Season 3]] airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Darth Vader – Black, White & Red 3|''Darth Vader – Black, White & Red'' 3]] published.
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 33|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 33]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 6|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 6]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 7|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 7]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 8|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 8]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[RJ Goes For A Swim]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
